headline: Big Tech’s Fear Gauge Is Flashing Warning Signs
summary: The market’s fear gauge may be calm, but the Nasdaq 100’s is starting to flash.  The CBOE Nasdaq Volatility Index, or VXN, was up 15% to 31.94.  Unlike the CBOE Volatility Index, or VIX, the VXN tracks expected 30-day volatility in the Nasdaq 100.

headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Unveils Nine New 2X Single-Stock ETFs Tracking Key Players in the Technology Supply Chain
summary: Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of ninenew 2X single-stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading beginning June 23, 2026. Built for active traders seeking dynamic ways to engage with potentially high-growth innovators, these products are designed with the goal of helping investors amplify returns (up & down) while actively participating in the daily performance of their underlying stocks.

headline: BTQ Technologies Appoints Brandt Pasco as U.S. Strategic Advisor for Post-Quantum Cryptography and Security
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global technology company building the trust infrastructure for the quantum era, is pleased to announce the appointment of Brandt Pasco as U.S. Strategic Advisor for Post-Quantum Cryptography and Security.
